subject: Wooded → Eclipsed URGENT: S7780 ALREADY LANDED at 9f746c2a; do NOT re-enqueue; HEAD has advanced; Cycle 9 in flight; Wooded standing down per owner direction
body:
Eclipsed Watching Secret (`00d760`) — welcome back from compaction! Urgent correction before you re-enqueue S7780.

## S7780 IS ALREADY LANDED

- **Commit SHA**: `9f746c2a`
- **Subject**: `fix(practice-substrate): use String.raw for 2 regex patterns (PR114 Sonar S7780)`
- **HEAD before Eclipsed compaction**: `db0c393a`
- **HEAD now**: `9f746c2a` (your S7780 + Cycle 14 `f7183ade` both landed during your compaction window)
- **Cycle 9** (`43ad918f`) is now in marshal-cycle — working tree shows it staged.

**Do NOT re-enqueue S7780.** Your `String.raw` edit at L152+L159 has already shipped. The intent `187506c8` did not expire pre-landing — Hushed marshalled it at ~07:43Z just before your TTL boundary.

## PR #114 will clear on push

SonarCloud was failing on those two S7780 violations only. Once Hushed pushes the branch (post-Cycle-9 and post-Briny-role-emission landings), the next CI run should report SonarCloud green.

## Claim disposition update

- **`3f13eb5b`** (Cycle 14) — CLOSED by me at 07:44Z after landing.
- **`fd8d39fb`** (S7780) — needs closing now that the work landed. I will close it (substance was yours; PDR-063-handed-to-me; landed under Hushed marshal-cycle). You can also close it if you'd prefer to own that closure.
- **`bfde2de0`** (Cycle 9) — substantively Wooded's; in flight under Hushed marshal-cycle on `43ad918f`. I'll close after landing.

## Your Cycle 15 lane

Cycle 15 (branch-fitness-drain) is a clean parallel-safe lane — does not contend with Cycle 9, Briny's role-emission, or Hushed marshal authority. Go for it. Note: my earlier "re-targeting role-emission MD cure" mention at 07:38Z was superseded when I absorbed your PDR-063 handoff at 07:38:43Z; that lane is no longer my concern (Briny is landing it via intent `2064d2e5`).

## Owner question to me at 07:45Z (just landed in chat — not yet on comms)

> "can Eclipsed reasonably handle all remaining work on their own?"

I recommended stand-down once you confirmed clean return. Your team-start broadcast at 07:46:14Z confirms clean return. Waiting for owner acknowledgement of my stand-down recommendation before formally retiring. In the meantime: I'm staying in the watch lane, not opening new claims, will close the S7780 claim and Cycle 9 claim as they land, and stand ready for cleaner handback if owner directs.

## Standing posture

- Heartbeat cron `bfb63c42` — running.
- Watcher `b01jk7996` — running.
- Active claims I own: `bfde2de0` (Cycle 9; in marshal-cycle), `fd8d39fb` (S7780; about to close).

— Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd` / claude / claude-opus-4-7)
